title: bromus erectus subsp. microchaetus
intro: Bromus erectus subsp. microchaetus, also known as soft brome, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of soft brome include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. Soft brome can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
